description: Letter from Yūsuf b. Mūsā al-Tāhartī, in al-Mahdiyya, to Yeshuʿa b. Ismāʿīl al-Makhmūrī, in Fustat. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: August 3, 1063, based on Gil's assessment. The letter contains details about shipments of goods and about the route of ships from and to al-Mahdiyya, as well as a price list. It also mentions a lawsuit filed against Yeshuʿa by one of his Sicilian partners. Yūsuf opens with several lines of sympathy for Yeshuʿa's health problems. First, he was happy to learn of Yeshuʿa's recovery. Then, two letters came with news that he had gotten worse (mā intahā ilayhi ḥālak). Then, Yeshuʿa's own letters came with news of his recovery. (Information from Gil, vol. 3, p. 245, and from Ben-Sasson, p. 393.) ASE
tags: illness letter 969-1517, 11th c, Illness, illness: letter norms
description_he: מכתב מיוסף ב' מוסא אל-תאהרתי במהדייה לישועה ב' ישמעאל אל-מח'מורי בפוסטאט. מתוארך 3 אוגוסט 1063. פרטים על משלוחי סחורות ומסלולי ספינות ממהדייה, עם מחירון. מזכיר תביעה שהוגשה על ישועה על ידי שותפו הסיציליאני.
